nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Paradise riflebird
nodes.summary: Paradise riflebird（Paradise riflebird，学名 Ptiloris paradiseus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于溫帶雨林、澳洲東岸，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 溫帶雨林
nodes.summary: 溫帶雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Australian king parrot、Des Murs's wiretail、綠貓鳥等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 澳洲東岸
nodes.summary: 澳洲東岸是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括笑翠鳥、斑噪钟鹊、Paradise riflebird等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in subtropical, temperate rainforests in eastern Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The paradise riflebird is endemic to eastern Australia, from New South Wales to Queensland, where it inhabits rainforests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Boatbills to Starlings}} It is highly vulnerable to deforestation and rainforest fragmentation due to its sedentary lifestyle and low population density, and has lost much of its original habitat. Currently, it is listed as a species of Least Concern, though its numbers are declining
